name: Arolla Aqua LT
comment: After the worldwide success of Arolla Aqua, we are proud to present Arolla Aqua LT, the family’s second ultra-equipped luminaire specially designed for larger spaces. Imagine a 900W white LED moving head that delivers exceptional brightness, great color accuracy, precise narrow long-throw beam, and advanced creative control – all in one rugged, IP66 weatherproof design. Designed for intensive outdoor use in long-distance applications requiring high precision, Arolla Aqua LT is the ultimate solution for lighting professionals who demand versatility, reliability, and creativity.
